questionText: Please disclose your petrochemicals production in the reporting year in thousand metric tons.
questionKo: Please disclose your petrochemicals production in the 보고연도 in thousand metric tons.
simpleHelp: Petrochemicals is an important part of the oil and gas value chain but not practiced by all integrated oil and gas companies or independent refiners. It is therefore necessary to take account of these activities separately. To help data users understand the coverage of activities employed by oil and gas companies, it is important for organizations to provide transparency on petrochemicals production activities, as these have environmental impacts and are exposed to transition risks.

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Chemicals" in response to 1.19.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 only appears 만약 you select "Chemicals" in response to 1.19.

guidance.text:
General 
Steam cracking is the main method of breaking down large molecules of hydrocarbons, in which a gaseous or liquid hydrocarbon is diluted with steam and then heated. The main products for the steam cracking process are high value chemicals (HVC's).
HVC's include lower olefins such as ethylene, propylene from the pyrolysis gas of steam crackers, benzene (contained amounts, excluding extracted amounts), butadiene (also contained), acetylene and hydrogen sold (as fuel).
If you select "Other, please specify," provide a label for the product.
guidance.textKo: 일반 Steam cracking is the main method of breaking down large molecules of hydrocarbons, in which a gaseous 또는 liquid hydrocarbon is diluted with steam 및 then heated. The main products 에 대한 steam cracking 프로세스 are high value chemicals (HVC's). HVC's include lower olefins such as ethylene, propylene from the pyrolysis gas of steam crackers, benzene (contained amounts, 제외 extracted amounts), butadiene (also contained), acetylene 및 hydrogen sold (as fuel). 만약 you select "Other, 직접 입력," provide a label 에 대한 product.

guidance.text:
High value chemicals: High value chemicals (HVCs) produced via steam cracking include ethylene, propylene from the pyrolysis gas of steam crackers, benzene (contained amounts, excluding extracted amounts), butadiene (also contained), acetylene, and hydrogen sold (as fuel).
Steam cracking: Steam cracking is the main method of breaking down large molecules of hydrocarbons, in which a gaseous or liquid hydrocarbon is diluted with steam and then heated. The main product for steam cracking process is HVC's.
guidance.textKo: High value chemicals: High value chemicals (HVCs) produced via steam cracking include ethylene, propylene from the pyrolysis gas of steam crackers, benzene (contained amounts, 제외 extracted amounts), butadiene (also contained), acetylene, 및 hydrogen sold (as fuel). Steam cracking: Steam cracking is the main method of breaking down large molecules of hydrocarbons, in which a gaseous 또는 liquid hydrocarbon is diluted with steam 및 then heated. The main product for steam cracking 프로세스 is HVC's.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 6/6 points is available for this question.
One row scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: 표시된 칸(셀)의 개수에 비례하여 완성된 칸(셀)마다 점수가 부여됩니다. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 6/6점입니다. One 행 scored.

criteria.criteria:
Table completed - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: Table 완성 - 1 점 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다.

simpleHelpKo: Petrochemicals is an important part 의 석유 및 가스 가치사슬 but not practiced by all integrated oil 및 gas companies 또는 independent refiners. It is therefore necessary to take account 의se activities separately. To help 데이터 사용자 understand the coverage of activities employed by oil 및 gas companies, it is important for organizations to provide transparency on petrochemicals production activities, as these have environmental impacts 및 are exposed to transition risks.
